channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Chief/Principal Investment Officer – Waste Sector
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Chief/Principal Investment Officer – Waste Sector Location: Washington, DC.
